description: Install dependencies and verify the existing project builds successfully before making any UI changes.
steps: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/wearcast/frontend && npm install` to install all dependencies
Run `cd /projects/sandbox/wearcast/frontend && npm run build` to verify TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling works
Confirm the build completes without errors
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` exits with code 0 and produces output in frontend/dist/
verification: Run `cd /projects/sandbox/wearcast/frontend && npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: npm install and build succeeded. NODE_OPTIONS must be unset before running npm commands due to a missing proxy-bootstrap.js in the sandbox environment. Build output is in frontend/dist/. TypeScript compilation and Vite bundling both pass without errors.
